---
title: "Analyzing Music Data"
author: "Srinika Gundlapally"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    embed-resources: false
    css: |
      #quarto-content, footer {
        display: none !important;
      }
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
music_data <- read_csv("data/music.csv")
print(music_data)
